message:
✨ Add TPU support and fix demo mode data issues (#450)

* 🐛 Fix demo data cluster names to match demo clusters

All demo events, pod issues, deployments, and LLM-d data now use
cluster names that match the demo clusters defined in shared.ts:
- eks-prod-us-east-1, gke-staging, vllm-gpu-cluster, etc.

Previously, demo data used mismatched names like prod-east, vllm-d,
staging which caused events and other data to be filtered out when
global cluster filters were applied.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add TPU support and fix demo mode data issues

- Add TPU support to Resource Allocation, Resource Capacity, and
  Resources drilldown cards with demo data
- Fix demo mode CPU/Memory showing 0 by ensuring getDemoClusters()
  is always used when demo mode is enabled
- Fix demo indicator color from purple to yellow in navbar
- Add two-row gauge layout for Resource Allocation (CPU/Memory top,
  GPU/TPU bottom)
- Add demo time series data to Cluster Metrics card
- Fix chart bar hover tooltip readability (white text, purple cursor)
- Fix security demo data cluster names to match demo clusters
- Increase spacing between gauge rows for better balance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix demo mode data not loading properly

- Fix useCachedEvents to fetch demo data in demo mode by returning
  fresh demo data from fetcher instead of relying on initialData
- Disable cache persistence in demo mode to avoid stale data
- Spread demo event timestamps across 24 hours for Event Activity chart

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+// Demo events - cluster names must match getDemoClusters() in shared.ts
+// Timestamps spread across 24 hours for chart visualization
+const getDemoEvents = (): ClusterEvent[] => {
+  const now = Date.now()
+  const hour = 3600000 // 1 hour in ms
+  return [
+    // Recent events (last hour)
+    { type: 'Warning', reason: 'FailedScheduling', message: 'No nodes available to schedule pod', object: 'pod/api-server-7d8f9c6b5-x2k4m', namespace: 'production', cluster: 'eks-prod-us-east-1', count: 3, firstSeen: new Date(now - 300000).toISOString(), lastSeen: new Date(now - 60000).toISOString() },

+    { type: 'Warning', reason: 'FailedMount', message: 'Unable to mount volumes for pod', object: 'pod/cache-redis-0', namespace: 'data', cluster: 'gke-staging', count: 2, firstSeen: new Date(now - 2 * hour).toISOString(), lastSeen: new Date(now - 2 * hour).toISOString() },

+    { type: 'Normal', reason: 'Created', message: 'Created container api', object: 'pod/api-service-7f8d', namespace: 'production', cluster: 'openshift-prod', count: 1, firstSeen: new Date(now - 14 * hour).toISOString(), lastSeen: new Date(now - 14 * hour).toISOString() },

+    { type: 'Normal', reason: 'Scheduled', message: 'Successfully assigned pod', object: 'pod/cron-job-xyz', namespace: 'jobs', cluster: 'gke-staging', count: 1, firstSeen: new Date(now - 20 * hour).toISOString(), lastSeen: new Date(now - 20 * hour).toISOString() },

+  ]
+}
